label: Value of Statistical Life and Value of Statistical Life Year
methodology: Based on Abelson (2007) willingness-to-pay estimates, updated annually using ABS Wage Price Index. Some academic reviews suggest AUD 7.0M may be more appropriate based on more recent stated preference studies.

source.publication: Best Practice Regulation Guidance Note: Value of Statistical Life
source.publisher: Office of Impact Analysis (OIA), Department of the Prime Minister and Cabinet

caveats: OIA central estimate; ATAP may use slightly different values for transport-specific analysis
Based on Abelson (2007) which is now nearly 20 years old; newer studies suggest higher values
Does not vary by age, income, or cause of death
